title: diachroa procumbens
intro: Diachroa procumbens, also known as the Mexican prickle poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Diachroa procumbens include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Diachroa procumbens can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
